title: JK Rowling ROASTS Emma Watson - Harry Potter Author Goes Scorched Earth
description:
After throwing JK Rowling under the Knight Bus multiple times for her views, it appears Emma Watson has changed her tune about the Harry Potter author that is responsible for her career. 
JK's response was thoughtful and savage. 
"Emma has so little experience of real life she's ignorant of how ignorant she is."
#hollywood #harrypotter 
Edited by @QTRBlackGarrett
